title: Weekly Schedule Generator
scenario: Create a simple weekly schedule template with space for tasks, notes, and a to-do list. The template should include a header with the week's dates and a section for each day. The output should be a formatted text string.
constraints: Use a standard font and headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the weekly schedule meets the specified constraints.
Verify that the tasks and sections are clear and specific.
Assess the overall formatting of the weekly schedule, including headings, spacing, and font choice.
